ukbflow – Claude Project Instructions

Source: CLAUDE.md

Project Overview

An R package providing a streamlined workflow for UK Biobank cloud-based analysis, clinical analysis, and publication-quality visualization. Designed to run natively on the UK Biobank Research Analysis Platform (RAP).

UK Biobank Data Policy (CRITICAL — Updated 2024+)

  • Individual-level data (phenotype + genotype) CANNOT be downloaded locally — this is now explicitly prohibited in UKB terms of use
  • All analysis must be conducted within the RAP cloud environment (DNAnexus-based)
  • Only summary-level outputs (aggregated statistics, plots, reports) may be downloaded
  • WES/WGS genetic data cannot be downloaded under any circumstances
  • Consequence for ukbflow: The package must be RAP-native; no functions should assume local data access

Architecture (RAP-native)

  • Midstream: Clinical and association analysis (ukb_table1, ukb_assoc)
  • Downstream: Publication-quality visualization (plot_ukb_forest, plot_ukb_surv, plot_ukb_phewas)
  • Note: Upstream data extraction functions (ukb_fetch, ukb_clean) need major refactor to be RAP-compatible

Key Conventions

  • Language: R (primary), Python (future)
  • Follow standard R package structure (R/, man/, tests/)
  • Use roxygen2 for documentation
  • Use MIT License

Repo

  • GitHub: https://github.com/evanbio/ukbflow (private)
  • Author: Evan Zhou
  • Email: evanzhou.bio@gmail.com

Directory Notes

  • dev/ — local dev tools and scripts, not tracked by git
  • CLAUDE.md — not tracked by git

Background

  • Motivated by pain points from the AD2cSCC UK Biobank analysis project
  • Existing alternative ukbtools is outdated and unmaintained; ukbflow fills the RAP-native gap
  • Publication goal: Bioinformatics Application Note（稳打稳扎，先发出来再说）
    • 后续有合作者、有曝光再考虑投更好的期刊（如 Briefings in Bioinformatics）
  • 演示用例：AD2cSCC 完整分析流程（GRS workflow，真实项目，说服力强）

Current Status（2026-03）

  • RAP 账号已申请：可在 RAP 上真实测试
  • 包骨架基本完成：R/ 目录各模块已有，正在进入 refactor + 文档阶段
  • 开发方式：Evan Zhou + Claude Code 协作，效率等同小团队
  • 可行性确认：竞品空白真实、用例完整、发表路径清晰，全面可行

Next Steps

  1. Refactor：定位改为 RAP-native，去掉本地下载假设
  2. 文档补全：roxygen2 + vignette（AD2cSCC 完整流程）
  3. pkgdown 网站：GitHub Pages
  4. bioRxiv preprint → 投 Bioinformatics Application Note

On this page

Developed by Evan Zhou. Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
